parsed_output.justification: Mitchell claimed to be the Insomniac very early in the discussion, which Paul and James interpreted as a suspicious 'fast claim' typical of a Werewolf bluff. While Justin attempted to defend Mitchell and claimed to be the Seer, he made a contradictory statement at the end of the transcript, claiming to be the Insomniac himself. This inconsistency, combined with the strong suspicions from Paul and James, makes Mitchell the most likely candidate for elimination to help Team Village win.
